title: Oru Mexican Aparatha
desc: Paul, a student from Thrissur, joins Maharaja's College in Ernakulam where he befriends Subhash. Along with him, they strive to reintroduce the SFY party on campus.

title: Oru Mexican Aparatha
desc: Paul befriends Subhash, a left-wing ideologist who despises the leadership of KSQ in his college. He plans to reintroduce the SFY party in the campus.

title: Chettayees
desc: Five friends decide to have a party on New Year's Eve. However, a series of events leads to a lot of unpleasantness and a rift between John and Kichu.

title: Lalsalam
desc: Mohanlal leads a workers uprising against greedy powers while Geetha adds heart to this stirring tale of justice and sacrifice.

title: Chantha
desc: Sulthan, a labourer, tries to save his community from an evil bourgeoisie. He decides to take down their oppressors and help his people in leading a respectable life.

title: Kakkakkuyil
desc: Sivaraman arrives in Mumbai in search of a job, but finds an old friend instead. Circumstances force them to rob a bank and they end up homeless.

title: Pokkiri Raja
desc: Madhavan Nair unknowingly kills a teenager; his son Raja takes the fall and serves five years. Post-prison, Raja saves a village lord's daughter and rises as his right-hand man, Pokkiri Raja.

title: Pokkiri Raja
desc: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.

title: Kaliyil Alpam Karyam
desc: Vinayan, a city guy who adores village life, becomes an officer in a village and unexpectedly falls for a girl who's completely different from him.

title: Aankiliyude Tharattu
desc: The film is about a love-affair between a married man and a young lady which leads to a murder.

title: Sharam
desc: Sunil earns Varma's trust and marries his sister, a person with mental disabilities, whom he later tries to kill. The police want to find the reasons behind all that he did.

title: Sharam
desc: Sunil marries Varma's mentally disabled sister, then attempts to kill her, as police investigate his motives for these shocking actions.

title: Vadakku Nokki Yanthram
desc: Thalathil Dineshan has a severe inferiority complex with respect to his short stature and dark complexion. When he gets married to a beautiful woman, his care for her soon turns into suspicion.

title: Vadakkunokkiyantram
desc: A man with average looks, lives an unconfident life and continuously suspects and spies on his attractive wife, until she resolves to leave him due to his nature.

title: Dr Live
desc: A health-focused program where medical experts discuss common illnesses, preventive care, and wellness tips, helping viewers lead healthier lives.

title: Koushalam
desc: Gopinadhan and Mathunni steal money from the rich and distribute it amongst the needy. When Mathunni robs Maya, Gopinadhan returns it and falls in love with her.

title: Koushalam
desc: The movie starring Siddique and Urvashi in the lead roles and is directed by T.S.Mohan.

title: Vakkeel Vasudev
desc: While driving Vishnu hits a man and kills him. He goes to the victim's house and falls in love with his daughter, but he doesn't reveal he is the killer.

title: Nadodikkattu
desc: After losing their jobs, Dasen and Vijayan don't see any chances to get work in Kerala. So both escape to Tamil Nadu, but can they find luck there?

title: Thenkasipattanam
desc: A group of friends lands in hilarious situations while chasing dreams and money, creating chaos and laughter through witty schemes and unexpected misadventures.

title: Oru Mutham Mani Mutham
desc: Balachandran, owing to pressure from his family to produce an heir marries Lekha. However he later chooses not to have children until two years later.

title: Thuruppu Gulan
desc: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

desc: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

title: Vellanakalude Naadu
desc: Pavithran tries to become a successful contractor. However, he faces many challenges when he has to please an IAS officer, who is his ex-girlfriend.

title: Rangam

desc: Vava, a villager, goes through many troubles as he is born to a Christian mother and a Brahmin father. However, he is determined to prove to the society that love matters the most.

title: Pallivathukkal Thommichan
desc: After many years, Dharman, a rich man, goes back to his village to take revenge against Thommichan, a businessman, for ruining his family.
